title: AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna)
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna) Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website aiimspatna.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna) Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website aiimspatna.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Post Graduate Degree, Including the integrated PG degree in Optometry, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Medical biochemistry, Clinical Pharmacology or Clinical Research. Second class Post Graduate Degree Including the integrated PG degree with PhD.
qualification.details: First class Post Graduate Degree, Including the integrated PG degree in Optometry, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Medical biochemistry, Clinical Pharmacology or Clinical Research. Second class Post Graduate Degree Including the integrated PG degree with PhD. Desirable: The Candidate who has worked in any extramural funded research project shall be preferred. The candidate should be well-versed in research methodology and possess knowledge of statistical analysis related to medical literature.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56000 Per Month + HRA 18%@Rs. 10,800pm increment @5% on initial emoluments

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Patna Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: A First class Post Graduate Degree in relevant fields like Optometry, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Medical Biochemistry, Clinical Pharmacology, or Clinical Research is required. A Second class Post Graduate Degree with a PhD is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years as of the notification date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contractual role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,000, along with HRA and a 5% increment on initial emoluments.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist (Non-Medical).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Patna located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Patna is located in Patna, Bihar, with the pincode 801507.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. Please refer to the official notification for details on the contract duration.
